creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Jeremy, hi Harold,

there hasn't been an update on this PR [1] for quite a while. I'm trying
to find out what the state of this is. Does the problem as described still
exist, or can this PR be closed?

Regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/114106
